bird.name: Martinique thrasher
bird.summary: The Martinique thrasher (Ramphocinclus brachyurus) is a species of bird in the family Mimidae. Semper and Sclater (1872) describe the white…

relations.subject: Martinique thrasher
relations.evidence: The Martinique thrasher total population is estimated at 133-267 individuals and is ranked as "endangered" according to the IUCN Red List. The rate of decline of the population has largely increased due to habitat loss.Young RP, Baptiste TJN, Dornelly A, Temple H, Whitehead H, Young HG, Morton MN
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
